name: golang-github-pelletier-go-buffruneio-dev
title: golang-github-pelletier-go-buffruneio-dev
summary: wrapper around bufio to provide buffered runes access
description:
wrapper around bufio to provide buffered runes access
Buffruneio is a wrapper around bufio to provide buffered runes access
with unlimited unreads.

When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-pelletier-go-buffruneio-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
